ns0:entry.ns0:title: Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python
Language: python
The 30 Days of Python programming challenge is a step-by-step guide to learn the Python programming language in 30 days. This challenge may take more than 100 days. Follow your own pace. These videos may help too: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7PNRuno1rzYPb1xLa4yktw

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser
Language: python
Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CloakHQ/CloakBrowser-Manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser-Manager
Language: python
Web-based browser profile manager for CloakBrowser — create, launch, and manage isolated browser profiles with unique fingerprints. Free, self-hosted Multilogin alternative

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness
Language: python
A framework for few-shot evaluation of language models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HunxByts/GhostTrack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HunxByts/GhostTrack
Language: python
Useful tool to track location or mobile number

ns0:entry.ns0:title: K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills
Language: python
A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MemoriLabs/Memori
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MemoriLabs/Memori
Language: python
Memori is agent-native memory infrastructure. A LLM-agnostic layer that turns agent execution and conversation into structured, persistent state for production systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MervinPraison/PraisonAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MervinPraison/PraisonAI
Language: python
PraisonAI 🦞 — Hire a 24/7 AI Workforce. Stop writing boilerplate and start shipping autonomous self-improving agents that research, plan, code, and execute tasks. Deployed in 5 lines of code with built-in memory, RAG, and support for 100+ LLMs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MustardChef/WSABuilds
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MustardChef/WSABuilds
Language: python
Run Windows Subsystem For Android on your Windows 10 and Windows 11 PC using prebuilt binaries with Google Play Store (MindTheGapps) and/or Magisk or KernelSU (root solutions) built in.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ansible/ansible
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ansible/ansible
Language: python
Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/spec-kit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/spec-kit
Language: python
💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

ns0:entry.ns0:title: graphdeco-inria/gaussian-splatting
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/graphdeco-inria/gaussian-splatting
Language: python
Original reference implementation of "3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huggingface/pytorch-image-models
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huggingface/pytorch-image-models
Language: python
The largest collection of PyTorch image encoders / backbones. Including train, eval, inference, export scripts, and pretrained weights -- ResNet, ResNeXT, EfficientNet, NFNet, Vision Transformer (ViT), MobileNetV4, MobileNet-V3 & V2, RegNet, DPN, CSPNet, Swin Transformer, MaxViT, CoAtNet, ConvNeXt, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: odoo/odoo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/odoo/odoo
Language: python
Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/whisper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/whisper
Language: python
Robust Speech Recognition via Large-Scale Weak Supervision

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opendatalab/MinerU
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU
Language: python
Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic workflows.
